20.02-20.03 код Праздника: These people are meant to be joyful, positive, and open. By radiating positive energy, a person activates their personal luck. If any worries arise, they should be released quickly. Code of failure: from age 37 to 39.
21.01-19.02 код Перемен: Such people are meant to change everything in their lives — their appearance, their style of dress, frequently rearranging their home surroundings, and so on. They should have many hobbies. A frequent change of residence is welcomed. Ideally, your profession will be connected with travel or business trips. By the way, it is good if you find a partner born under the same sign. Code of failure: from age 23 to 25.
21.03 – 20.04 код Переживаний: The heaviest code of all. Every problem is resolved through emotional experience. You must keep to the middle path — feel the worry, then let it go, and the situation will resolve itself. Your problems will be solved once you have emotionally worked through them and released them. Do not forget to return to a positive state. Code of failure: from age 39 to 41.
21.04-20.05 код Независимости: Independence. Under no circumstances should these people become attached to anyone or idealize their relationships. Otherwise, they will be haunted by betrayals and infidelities. Do not cling to your work. Distribute your energy so there are no imbalances or inflated expectations. The moment you put all your eggs in one basket, all is lost. Maintain at least two income-generating activities. Women with this code must not stay at home. Code of failure: from age 45 to 47.
21.05-21.06 код Мечтателя: The dreams of these people always come true. You must set a goal and then emotionally release it at the right moment. Vision boards and mandalas are a must. Set big goals — but this does not apply to your personal life. Code of failure: from age 18 to 21.
22.06-22.07 код Шапкозакидателя: They must always raise their own bar. Though it may seem impossible to achieve, they are meant to strive for more and to free themselves of fears and doubts. Leap above your own head — in every sphere. But do not forget to take active steps. The moment you relax and sink into the depths of monotony and stability, you lose everything. Code of failure: from age 24 to 26.
22.11-21.12 код Облагораживается: The self-realization of these people is directly connected with their profession (design, photography, styling, and any other form of creativity). Choosing such professions guarantees success. Code of failure: from age 33 to 35.
22.12-20.01 код Карьеры: For them, career growth must be the most important thing. Women must not stay at home, and men must not remain in one place. This behavioral code closely resembles the code of the high achiever. A person needs self-realization and constant growth. You must build a team and strive to take a leadership position — or start your own business. Code of failure: from age 48 to 50.
23.07-22.08 код Короля: A person must carry themselves in a regal and elevated manner — heeding wise teachers, yet always holding their own opinion. They should occupy a leadership position or be the owner of a business. It is important to understand that a king does not only command, but also cares for his people. Code of failure: from age 18 to 20.
23.08-22.09 код Рекламы: They must practice self-admiration, they must announce themselves to the world, and under no circumstances should they be modest. Declare yourself actively and creatively. Be a star, while at the same time filling yourself with knowledge. Code of failure: from age 18 to 20.
23.09-23.10 код Стервозности: These people are meant to behave ambitiously, with a sharp edge, and not to fear what others may think of them. Those who are unnecessary will fall away on their own. Express your individuality and flamboyance — it will bring you money. Code of failure: from age 33 to 35.
24.10-21.11 код Серого кардинала: They must avoid the public eye and, in relationships, present themselves as the weaker personality. In their profession, they need to stay in the shadows and not reveal all of their power. Be influential, but do not shine the spotlight on yourself or boast of your abilities. Code of failure: from age 56 to 58.
